{{Infobox group
| name = The Eight-Man Empire
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[The Eight-Man Empire Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] is a highly powerful group of wandering conquerors that functions as a collective [[Monarch]]. Although the individual members are separate [[sacred artists]]—typically [[Sages]] or [[Heralds]]—they are linked through a unique spiritual bond known as the [[Path of the Eightfold Spear]]. This connection is facilitated by eight specialized Divine Treasures in the form of intricate golden armor, which allows the members to share and access each other's powers. This cognitive enhancement and shared energy network grant them a combined strength that can rival or even exceed the power of a single [[Monarch]]. [[The Empire]] is composed of eight distinct warbands, including groups such as the [[Blood-Chorus]], [[Ghost-Blade]], [[Flame-Gift]], and [[Nine-Hands]]. These warbands serve as the organization's workforce and consist of various ranks, including Underlords, [[Overlords]], and Archlords. The armor itself is a vital component of their identity; it is passed down to successors when a member dies and is noted for being nearly indestructible, capable of resisting attacks even from massive numbers of [[Gold]]-ranked artists. While they operate as mercenaries or independent entities, they are capable of significant political and military influence, often being hired by powerful figures like [[Reigan Shen]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The armor of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] is a cross between a [[Remnant]] and a [[construct]], and it is passed to a successor when a member dies.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is a group where even ten thousand [[Gold]] [[sacred artists]] could not scratch their armor.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is a powerful entity whose reputation is supposedly exaggerated.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Del'rek]] joined the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] calls up would-be squires from their territory for the tournament.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] is a faction composed of four teams from the [[Ghost-Blade]], [[Flame-Gift]], [[Blood-Chorus]], and [[Nine-Hands]] warbands. While the empire maintains control over warlords from the [[Blood-Chorus]], it is also known as the faction where [[Larian]] served as a renowned archer. During certain events, [[Ziel]] competed as a champion for the empire while spectators watched from a dedicated tower. The group is further identified by a plain tower featuring eight gold-armored men and women hovering above it.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] has four teams from different warbands: [[Ghost-Blade]], [[Flame-Gift]], [[Blood-Chorus]], and [[Nine-Hands]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] controls warlords from [[Blood-Chorus]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Ziel]] fought as a champion of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] has a tower where spectators were located.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is a faction where [[Larian]] was a renowned archer.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] has a plain tower with eight gold-armored men and women hovering over it.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Composed of wandering conquerors, the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] is a collective [[Monarch]] made up of individual [[Sages]] and [[Heralds]] clad in golden armor. These founding members crafted their eight suits of [[Divine Treasure]] to link their wills together, though the group is not known for meticulous attention to detail. After emerging from a door, the empire sought an excuse to support one side of a conflict, noting they would back [[Mercy's mother]] if she were victorious. During their travels, they provided Sophara with a [[Tear of the Deep]] and granted [[Yerin]] both mental enhancement and a thought [[construct]]. Despite their power, [[Kiuran]] suggested that [[Yerin]] possessed the potential to kill the entire empire.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] consists of gold-armored figures who are considered a [[Monarch]] collectively, but are individually [[Sages]] or [[Heralds]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] walked out a door.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is looking for an excuse to support one side or the other.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] consists of wandering conquerors and a collective [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The founding members of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] crafted eight suits of golden armor that act as Divine Treasures to link their wills.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] would support [[Mercy's mother]] if she won.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is not known for meticulous attention to detail.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] gave Sophara a [[Tear of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] absorbed a thought [[construct]] from the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] gave [[Yerin]] mental enhancement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] suggested [[Yerin]] could kill the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Larian]] belongs to the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is a concept or entity that [[Lindon]] recalls.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] appeared to witness Reigan's triumph.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] was hired by [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] consists of at least two members present at the [[island]] siege.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] invited [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] to join them.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] has a cognition enhancement [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is a group represented by [[Larian]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After being addressed by [[Larian]], the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] saw its numbers dwindle to six members before the group eventually vanished. Upon their return, they focused on training with the spear and were studied by Reigan, who researched their armor to design a specific collar. The group later acted as a shield for Emriss by holding back the Dragon and eventually aligned themselves with [[Lindon]]. During an assault on the [[Bleeding Phoenix]], they utilized the power of all aspects, with [[Larian]] and Del’rek serving as the group's representatives.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] addresses the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] was down to six members.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] vanished.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] trains with the spear.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan researched the armor of the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]] to design the collar.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] held back the Dragon for Emriss.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] is on [[Lindon]]'s side.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] assaulted the [[Bleeding Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Eight-Man Empire]] used power of all aspects.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Larian]] and Del’rek represent the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Larian]] is from the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“The Eight-Man Empire is not known for its meticulous attention to detail,” Charity said.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Oh, right. They’ve got a shine for us. Invited the pair of us to join them.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Can you two speak for the Eight-Man Empire?”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Larian of the Eight-Man Empire, meet my sister, Kelsa.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
